cases.human_readable_reason: Optional parser/OCR backend dependency is not installed in the current environment.
cases.repair_suggestion: Install the matching parser extra or rerun with backend=builtin.

cases.human_readable_reason: Requested backend id is not in the Core backend registry.
cases.repair_suggestion: Run parser-backend-registry and retry with a listed backend_id.

cases.human_readable_reason: The selected backend has no supported source for the provided file type.
cases.repair_suggestion: Use a supported file extension or select a backend with matching supported_extensions.

cases.human_readable_reason: Backend import cannot be resolved without importing heavy packages.
cases.repair_suggestion: Install the optional backend dependency in a dedicated environment.

cases.human_readable_reason: Backend runtime was invoked but raised an exception.
cases.repair_suggestion: Inspect backend dependency/model installation or rerun with backend=builtin.

cases.human_readable_reason: Backend completed but returned no extractable text.
cases.repair_suggestion: Review the source or route through a more suitable OCR/parser backend.
